Dovepress: Figure  4  Flow cytometry analysis of Jurkat cells after staining with Annexin V-FITC/PI. Cells were treated with 6-MP solution (A), 6-MPCs (B) or 6-MPNs (C) at different
concentrations of 0.5 μM, 2 μM and 5 μM, respectively. The quantitative apoptosis rates in 6-MPNs, 6-MP solution, and 6-MPCs groups were calculated as the sum of early and late
apoptosis at different concentrations of 0.5 μM (D), 2 μM (E), 5 μM (F). The data are presented as the mean ± SD of three independent experiments (*P < 0.05; **P < 0.01).
